creator: val@packett.cool
text:
Created attachment 217584
waffle-161.patch

Waffle 1.6.1 includes a fix for -fno-common: https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/mesa/waffle/-/merge_requests/70

Tested with apitrace. ABI didn't break.

Switching to new xdg-shell MR that works with the current version: https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/mesa/waffle/-/merge_requests/76
